docket_entries.description: AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WONG, BRIAN AS TO DEFENDANT ULLOA, KEVIN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2022 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED NOV-09-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ULLOA, KEVIN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-08-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-12-2022 BY PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF BRIAN WONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KEVIN ULLOA IS NOT PRESENT. THE COURT REVIEWED THE COMPLAINTS AND HEARS ALL THREE CASES TOGETHER WITH A SMALL CLAIMS'LIMIT OF TOTAL REWARD AT $10,000 PLUS COSTS CSM-22-865993 (THIS CASE, CSM-22-6866251, AND CSM-22-866252. THE PLAINTIFF AGREES TO THE CAP THE LIMIT AT $10,000 PLUS COSTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASED CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF TO FILE AN AMENDED CLAIM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-13-2022 - CONTINUED TO DEC-08-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 FOR PLAINTIFF TO FILE AN AMENDED CLAIM. PLAINTIFF BRIAN WONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KEVIN ULLOA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINTIFF INFORMS THE COURT THAT HE IS SEEKING OVER CLAIM AMOUNT OF $2,500. COURT FINDS MR. WONG HAS ONE OTHER SMALL CLAIMS CASE (CSM-22-865405) FILED IN THIS CALENDAR YEAR OF 2022; OTHER CASES (CSM-22-865272, CSM-22-865407 AND CSM-22-865532) ARE COVID-19 RENTAL DEBT CLAIMS, THEREFORE, PLAINTIFF BRIAN WONG IS ALLOWED TO FILE AN AMENDED CLAIM OVER CLAIM AMOUNT OF $2,500 THAT HE IS SEEKING. PLAINTIFF NEEDS TO SERVE AMENDED CLAIM AND TO GIVE NOTICE OF THE AMENDED AMOUNT ON AMENDED CLAIM TO DEFENDANT KEVIN ULLOA. PLAINTIFF INFORMS THE COURT THAT THERE IS PENDING EVICTION CASE# CUD-22-669939 THAT HE HAS FILED AGAINST DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY WONG, BRIAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, BRIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ULLOA, KEVIN $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,075.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY WONG, BRIAN AS TO DEFENDANT ULLOA, KEVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-13-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED AUG-29-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ULLOA, KEVIN
